title: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
summary: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
briefing: Peter Stokes, 19, has been charged in the US for allegedly taking part in a hacking group’s unsuccessful $8 million crypto ransom scheme.

title: AI agent development hasn’t accelerated as expected, Zuckerberg says
summary: AI agent development hasn’t accelerated as expected, Zuckerberg says
briefing: Mark Zuckerberg’s comments came on the same day that Meta expanded its Meta Business Agent globally for businesses on Instagram, Messenger and WhatsApp.

title: US dominates Polymarket political bets despite geoblock: Report
summary: US dominates Polymarket political bets despite geoblock: Report
briefing: New data from Allium suggest that US users are bypassing geoblocks to bet on markets offered on Polymarket’s global platform.

title: Strategy will be ‘less important’ in Bitcoin after STRC incident: Bitwise
summary: Strategy will be ‘less important’ in Bitcoin after STRC incident: Bitwise
briefing: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan said Strategy's STRC offer of high yields and low volatility was always a questionable fit for buying Bitcoin, as the cryptocurrency offers neither.

title: Securitize gains on NYSE debut with tokenized stocks live on Solana, Avalanche
summary: Securitize gains on NYSE debut with tokenized stocks live on Solana, Avalanche
briefing: Securitize has issued tokenized versions of its shares on Solana and Avalanche, marking the first time a newly public company has done so on its debut.

title: Bitcoin holds $61K after US jobs data report, AI sector weakness: Did BTC bottom?
summary: Bitcoin holds $61K after US jobs data report, AI sector weakness: Did BTC bottom?
briefing: Bitcoin bulls may make a run on $70,000 after weak US jobs data eased rate hike fears and capital looks to rotate into BTC and gold.

title: Is Bitcoin heading for $65K? Sharplink buys $16M ETH: Market Moves
summary: Is Bitcoin heading for $65K? Sharplink buys $16M ETH: Market Moves
briefing: Analysts are divided on Bitcoin's next move, but there's some hope at last. Meanwhile, SharpLink has resumed buying Ether after an eight-week pause, and other market news.

title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
summary: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
briefing: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
summary: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
briefing: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

title: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
summary: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
briefing: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
summary: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
briefing: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

title: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
summary: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
briefing: Researchers say a new jailbreak technique tricked AI models into treating attacker-written text as their own reasoning, bypassing safety guardrails and exposing a deeper security flaw.

title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
summary: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
briefing: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
summary: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
briefing: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.

title: Crypto Shorts Get Rekt as Bitcoin, Ethereum and XRP Rise to Weekly High Prices
summary: Crypto Shorts Get Rekt as Bitcoin, Ethereum and XRP Rise to Weekly High Prices
briefing: Bitcoin continued rising after hitting a 21-month-low earlier this week, topping $62,000 and leading a broader crypto market rebound.

title: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
summary: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
briefing: FBI Director Kash Patel failed to disclose a significant purchase of stock in Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy from last November.
